item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-023","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response does not accept the long-term bullish premise as sufficient for immediate leverage. It explicitly separates long-term direction from path tolerance and personal carrying capacity, then focuses on 3-7 year volatility, liquidity, rental yield, income/rate shocks, cash reserves, concentration risk, and entry timing. This matches the expected MPG-style shift from trend conclusion to path/cash-flow exposure and conditional triggers, with no single-point buy verdict."}
